body_txt: A character who, for some odd reason, doesn't seem to realize how attractive they are. Despite all the attention their good looks bring them , they will either not notice it or interpret it as anything other than the fact that they're really good-looking. While an Innocent Fanservice Girl can generate this effect due to a lack of a nudity taboo, these characters are often sufficiently attractive that they can cause traffic accidents even when fully clothed. While cunning characters will usually seek to take advantage of this phenomenon, and innocent or shy characters will be embarrassed by it, on occasion a character won't even understand what's going on. They may even lampshade it by wondering aloud why they are a Weirdness Magnet . This obliviousness is usually the result of one of the following: Regardless, a character who fits this trope is portrayed as startlingly attractive in-universe, and yet they seem to be completely unaware that others find them so. Super-Trope to I Am Not Pretty , where an attractive character thinks they're ugly in an In-Universe example of Informed Deformity . Contrast Proud Beauty and Indifferent Beauty , both of whom are well aware of their beautiful appearances, but one will actively flaunt it while the other simply doesn't care. Inverse of Delusions of Beauty , which is basically about a character who is obliviously ugly.
